title: Scarlet and Kyros Become Family
description: Pages 11–15 focus on scarlet and kyros become family, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows King Riku, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as kyros's life as Dressrosa's legendary fighter and his bond with King Riku, Scarlet, and Rebecca reveal the human heart behind the toy soldier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Someone just got show!! Is it the Riku Royal Army Again?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why did you not wait for me....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But of course... I must have dis-appeared from your heart*as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Has every- thing truly gone...?! even our promise!?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I do not know who you may be, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: She is waiting for me...she is hungry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What kind of parting is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: This is hell!!! This is too much!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: With these arms of tin... I cannot even feel your warmth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I can see enemies coming our way from the ground floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: unforgiv- able!! to think that was an impostor posing as the young master!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The straw hats must be above the first floor. Violet's blood was on the wall!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: If we will be cornered and forced to fight either way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Would it be better to simply launch an ambush on Doflamingo now?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I fear usoland and his team may be too late...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Come to think of it... you are all pirates, are you not?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I REA- LISED THE TRUTH ABOUT FRALAND AND USOLAND AFTER A WHILE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: No... I too am a criminal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: If we share the same goal, I am glad of your help.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: A crack underneath the colos- Seum...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: The colossem has never had to withstand the kind of forces it's suffered today...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Burgess' attack was the nail in the coffin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: At this rate, the whole stadium could collapse....!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: I'll tell you as many times as you like, Rebecca!! The man who shot your mother, scarlet, dead...

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Whoa, whoa, my barrier isn't built to handle verbal assaults!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Mr soldier... !! It's no good... I...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: I'll go and buy something for you to eat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: I'm so frus- traded... my body won't move....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: U...U...USOP!! I know I can rely on you... hurry up and cause...the (Panic......!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: There's a massive battle going on in the officers' tower...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: USOP of the straw hat pirates....!! go get 'em!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: I don't even know your face, but good luck, usopp!! If you win this battle, I'll be in your debt forever....!!

summary: Scarlet and Kyros Become Family develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through King Riku, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
